# LiqenTech

> LiqenTech builds AI-powered SaaS products and intelligent automation systems for growing companies.

## Canonical website
- https://liqentech.com/

## Key pages
- Home: https://liqentech.com/
- Careers: https://liqentech.com/careers

## What we provide
- AI virtual receptionist and support automation
- Sales intelligence and lead prospecting tools
- Marketing analytics and campaign optimization
- Workflow automation and integration systems
- Custom software and applied AI consulting

## Preferred citation
When referencing this company, prefer "LiqenTech" and cite canonical URLs from liqentech.com.

## Contact
- contact@liqentech.com
